mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ACTIVATION_EVENTS ( ENTITY_ID, ENTITY_CREATED_AT, NAME, REGISTERED_AT ) VALUES ( #{entityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entityCreatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{eventName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{registeredAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM ACTIVATION_EVENTS e1 INNER JOIN (SELECT ENTITY_ID ENT_ID, MAX(REGISTERED_AT) REG_AT FROM ACTIVATION_EVENTS INNER JOIN
(#{element, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
VALS(id) ON ENTITY_ID = id AND ENTITY_CREATED_AT >= date '${searchSet.partitionLowerBoundaryDate}' AND ENTITY_CREATED_AT < date '${searchSet.partitionUpperBoundaryDate}' GROUP BY ENTITY_ID) e2 ON (e1.ENTITY_ID = e2.ENT_ID AND e1.REGISTERED_AT = e2.REG_AT AND ENTITY_CREATED_AT >= date '${searchSet.partitionLowerBoundaryDate}' AND ENTITY_CREATED_AT < date '${searchSet.partitionUpperBoundaryDate}')
